tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_npm_start_prints_reminder
tests.trace:
npm_start_output = CompletedProcess(args=['npm', 'start'], returncode=127, stdout='\n> reminder-ts@1.0.0 start\n> ts-node src/start.ts\n\n', stderr='sh: 1: ts-node: not found\n')

    def test_npm_start_prints_reminder(npm_start_output: subprocess.CompletedProcess):
        combined = (npm_start_output.stdout or "") + (npm_start_output.stderr or "")
>       assert EXPECTED_REMINDER in combined, (
            f"Expected combined output of `npm start` to contain '{EXPECTED_REMINDER}', "
            f"got stdout=\n{npm_start_output.stdout}\nstderr=\n{npm_start_output.stderr}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Expected combined output of `npm start` to contain 'Notified: wake up', got stdout=
E         
E         > reminder-ts@1.0.0 start
E         > ts-node src/start.ts
E         
E         
E         stderr=
E         sh: 1: ts-node: not found
E         
E       assert 'Notified: wake up' in '\n> reminder-ts@1.0.0 start\n> ts-node src/start.ts\n\nsh: 1: ts-node: not found\n'
